name: Athena-Intelligent-Olympia
description: Trọn bộ phần mềm Trí Tuệ Athena
displayDescription: Reverse-engineered and feature-extended quiz competition software suite inspired by Vietnam's Olympia TV show. Built by studying the original closed-source Athena software, then recreating and enhancing it with new capabilities. Contains 8+ projects: AIClient (player app), AIServer (host app), AICtrlLib (control library), AIDataManager (question DB), AILib (shared logic), EncodingAthenaData/DecodingAthena (data tools), and ExcelToAthenaDatabase (Excel import). Features client-server multiplayer, AI opponent, and question database management. Used by Vietnamese schools and clubs running knowledge contests. Built with C#, WPF.
